message:
fix(net): add WorkerCoordinator::remove_job() to prevent tracking map leak + UBS annotation housekeeping

WorkerCoordinator tracked jobs in a HashMap but never removed terminal
entries (completed, failed, cancelled). On long-running coordinators with
high job throughput, this leaked memory proportional to total lifetime
job count.

New remove_job(job_id) method removes terminal jobs from the tracking map
and returns the last known state, allowing callers to clean up after
observing a terminal transition.

Also relocated several ubs:ignore annotations to satisfy UBS's line-level
comment scanning (io_op.rs, state.rs, symbol_cancel.rs) — no behavioral
changes in those files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
